title: E-Commerce Platform
description: A full-featured e-commerce platform built with Next.js, featuring product catalog, shopping cart, and payment integration with Stripe.
longDescription: This project demonstrates a complete e-commerce solution with real-time inventory management, user authentication, and a modern checkout experience. Built with Next.js for frontend and Node.js for backend APIs. The platform includes advanced features like personalized recommendations, wishlist functionality, and multi-currency support.

title: Social Media Dashboard
description: Real-time analytics dashboard for social media management with data visualization and user insights.
longDescription: A comprehensive dashboard that aggregates data from multiple social media platforms, providing real-time analytics, engagement metrics, and actionable insights for content creators. Features include automated scheduling, performance tracking, and competitor analysis tools.

title: Task Management App
description: Collaborative task management application with real-time updates and team features.
longDescription: A modern task management solution featuring real-time collaboration, team workspaces, and integrated communication tools. Built with cutting-edge web technologies for optimal performance. Supports Kanban boards, timeline views, and automated workflows.

title: AI Content Generator
description: AI-powered content generation tool for creating blog posts, social media content, and marketing copy.
longDescription: Leveraging advanced AI models, this application helps content creators generate high-quality, optimized content across multiple platforms. Features include tone customization and SEO optimization. The tool uses GPT technology for intelligent content creation.

title: Weather Application
description: Beautiful weather application with real-time data, forecasts, and location-based services.
longDescription: A sleek weather app featuring real-time weather data, multi-location support, detailed forecasts, and weather alerts. Built with responsive design principles for all devices. Includes interactive maps and air quality information.
